keys.classic: The dish's dominant flavor profile — keywords that echo and amplify what makes it distinctive
keys.contrast: The heavy, rich, fatty or intense qualities of the dish — what a contrasting wine should cut through
keys.safe_bet: Neutral, crowd-pleasing qualities — a wine that won't clash and suits any palate

_meta.note: Keywords are in plain food/taste language, not wine vocabulary. Word2Vec translates them into grape space via cosine similarity.
